message:
Port YAML operators to neo (#6033) ## 🔍 Problem - `read_yaml` and `write_yaml` still relied on the legacy parser/printer adapters in neo. - YAML operator coverage still lived in legacy compiler snapshot tests. ## 🛠️ Solution - Add executor-native `ReadYaml` and `WriteYaml` operators via `OperatorPlugin` descriptions. - Keep the legacy YAML parser and printer adapters for compatibility. - Move YAML operator coverage to neo tests and add a regression test for diagnostic prefixing. ## 💬 Review - Focus on line/document boundary handling in `ReadYaml`. - Check snapshot/finalize behavior against the other line-oriented neo readers. - Verify the shared YAML rendering path and the new operator tests. resolves TNZ-190
resolves TNZ-191

files.patch:
